case_title: MELODY TERMECHI VS. AMY CHEUNG et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2011 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $690.00 FILED BY TERMECHI, MELODY AS TO DEFENDANT CHEUNG, AMY SOLOW, MIKE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF, SERVED SUCESSFULLY TO MIKE SOLOW ON 10/24/11 BY SUBSTITUTED SERVICE. (SERVICE FEE $0.00<WAIVED>)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TERMECHI, MELODY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHEUNG, AMY SOLOW, MIKE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TERMECHI, MELODY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED OCT-21-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHEUNG, AMY
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-15-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
